title: Heavy Rain
description: Makes all Rain in Minecraft hit Hard.
body:
## About Me:
- **HEAVY RAIN** is a resourcepack that increases the volume of Rain that pours in the game. This resourcepack also decreases the saturation of the rain, so it appears more realistically gray.
- This resourcepack is **ideal and works best** when paired with Horror Map/Mods, as **HEAVY RAIN** causes heavy obstruction of vision.
- If you are a Mapmaker/Creator, feel free to use this resourcepack and/or integrating its assets into your resourcepack!
- You can change to a colored Rain Texture by going to the file path: `assets/minecraft/textures/environment` and renaming `rain_blue.png` to `rain.png`.
  
## Some Recommendations.
- It is recommended to pair this resourcepack with a Sound Mod/Resourcepack.
- It is recommended to use Shaders/Shaderpacks that Enhance Water Visuals.
